text: We had a cherry blossom viewing party with the members of the research lab!
We held a welcome party for the new students in the lab!

Yuto Morioka presented the paper "Deep Reinforcement Learning-based Aircraft Path Planning Method for Low-Altitude Economy" (co-authored with Shikhar Varma, Tinghan Wei, and Mikifumi Shikida) at a conference held at the Hiroshima City University Satellite Campus.
